eas_text: A civil authority has issued A PRACTICE/DEMO WARNING for the following counties or areas: Clark, WA; Clackamas; Columbia; Multnomah; Washington, OR; at 9:52 AM on MAR 12, 2019 Effective until 11:52 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a practice demo warning issued by Clark Regional Emergency Services Agency in Vancouver, Washington.  This concludes this test message.
